title: T-042 — Scanner FEFO suggest endpoint (WH §13.5)
prompt:
# T-042 — Scanner FEFO suggest endpoint (WH §13.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §13.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `POST /api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp` returning top-5 ranked LP suggestions for {wo_id, wo_material_id, qty_needed, warehouse_id} per fefo_strategy_v1 (T-014). Wraps T-030.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/route.ts` thin wrapper around `findPickSuggestions` (T-030) limited to top 5.
2. Returns `{suggestions: [...top5], strategy_rule_id: 'fefo_strategy_v1'|'fifo_strategy_v1'}` for client traceability.
3. Scanner session auth.

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 10 candidate LPs, when called, then top-5 ranked by the active strategy returned.
2. Given the wo_material's product picking_strategy='fifo', when called, then strategy_rule_id='fifo_strategy_v1' in response.
3. Given no candidates, when called, then `{suggestions: []}` returned (not an error).

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/scanner-suggest.test.ts` asserting top-5 limit, strategy switch, empty case.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-suggest`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate FEFO logic — delegate to T-030.
- Do not skip session auth.

## Dependencies
- T-030
- T-041
